title: annona nutans
intro: Annona nutans, also known as the wild custard apple, is a species of flowering plant in the custard apple family, Annonaceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Annona nutans include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an anti-diarrheal agent. Herbal preparations of Annona nutans are often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and may also be used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
